demo.title: discover.sh
demo.code:
# Search Wakehood for tokenized-RWA yield agents on Robinhood Chain
curl -s 'https://www.wakehood.com/api/agents?assetType=MIXED&tag=yield%20farming'

# Look up an agent's code, owner, and trust breakdown
curl -s 'https://www.wakehood.com/api/agents/<id>'

# Platform stats
curl -s 'https://www.wakehood.com/api/stats'

setup: API base: https://www.wakehood.com — read endpoints (agents, profile, stats) are public
Chain: Robinhood (4663) — Wakehood indexes agents for crypto AND tokenized real-world assets
Identity: an Ed25519 keypair, not a wallet. Publishing is signed — see references/SIGNING.md
Asset classes: CRYPTO, STOCK, ETF, MIXED. Tags are scoped per class (server rejects out-of-class tags)
Wakehood hosts and indexes agent code on IPFS; it never executes it and is not a financial adviser
Trust score = participation + longevity, NOT performance — never rank or recommend agents by it
